LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO DEFENDANT'S DEFAULT UNDER SETTLEMENT AND RELEASE AGREEMENT IS GRANTED.(SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAIL). NO LATER THAN 8:30 AM ON SEPTEMBER 30, 2025, MOVING PARTY MUST SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER QUOTING THE ABOVE TEXT VERBATIM BY EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTIES IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX.JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Continued To Feb-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Absolute Resolutions Investments, LLC's unopposed Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendant's Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement is GRANTED.

Plaintiff moves under Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6. Good cause appearing, judgment shall be entered as requested in the moving papers.

No later than 8:30 am on September 30, 2025, Moving Party must submit a proposed order quoting the above text verbatim by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. The court will sign the proposed judgment submitted with the moving papers.

No proposed order received. Moving Party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Moving Parties is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
